message:
refactor: Use metal0 h2.Client for HTTP instead of std.http.Client

Eliminates duplicate HTTP code between EdgeBox and Metal0 by using
Metal0's h2.Client which provides:
- HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2 support
- TLS 1.3 with connection pooling
- HPACK header compression
- gzip decompression

Simplifies HTTP implementation from ~130 lines to ~50 lines.
